repo.description: The most widely used Python to C compiler
repo.name: cython

body:
It's likely faster most of the time by avoiding creating a tuple without good reason.

Also switch a cyfunction method too (although in this case to NOARGS, again to avoid a tuple).

comment_data.body: I believe this is a bugfix and the 3.2.x PR is https://github.com/cython/cython/pull/7677
Thinking about it more, I might revert this change because it might still be useful in one place or higher versions

commit.message:
Switch to vectorcall for coroutine methods where possible

It's likely faster most of the time by avoiding creating a tuple
without good reason.

Also switch a cyfunction method too (although in this case to
NOARGS, again to avoid a tuple).

Don't change __Coroutine_Throw

it's sometimes useful to pass args along, even with vectorcall.
